scripts.test:entrypoints: node --input-type=module -e "import('./app/javascript/tree_view/index.js').then((module) => { if (typeof module.registerTreeViewControllers !== 'function') throw new Error('registerTreeViewControllers export is missing'); const expectedIdentifiers = { state: 'tree-view-state', client: 'tree-view-client', selection: 'tree-view-selection', transfer: 'tree-view-transfer', remoteState: 'tree-view-remote-state' }; if (JSON.stringify(module.TreeViewControllerIdentifiers) !== JSON.stringify(expectedIdentifiers)) throw new Error('TreeViewControllerIdentifiers export is out of sync'); const expectedEntries = [{ key: 'state', identifier: expectedIdentifiers.state, controller: module.TreeViewStateController }, { key: 'client', identifier: expectedIdentifiers.client, controller: module.TreeViewClientController }, { key: 'selection', identifier: expectedIdentifiers.selection, controller: module.TreeViewSelectionController }, { key: 'transfer', identifier: expectedIdentifiers.transfer, controller: module.TreeViewTransferController }, { key: 'remoteState', identifier: expectedIdentifiers.remoteState, controller: module.TreeViewRemoteStateController }]; if (!Array.isArray(module.TreeViewControllerEntries) || module.TreeViewControllerEntries.length !== expectedEntries.length || expectedEntries.some((entry, index) => module.TreeViewControllerEntries[index]?.key !== entry.key || module.TreeViewControllerEntries[index]?.identifier !== entry.identifier || module.TreeViewControllerEntries[index]?.controller !== entry.controller)) throw new Error('TreeViewControllerEntries export is out of sync'); const expected = [[expectedIdentifiers.state, module.TreeViewStateController], [expectedIdentifiers.client, module.TreeViewClientController], [expectedIdentifiers.selection, module.TreeViewSelectionController], [expectedIdentifiers.transfer, module.TreeViewTransferController], [expectedIdentifiers.remoteState, module.TreeViewRemoteStateController]]; const application = { calls: [], register(identifier, controller) { this.calls.push([identifier, controller]); } }; module.registerTreeViewControllers(application); if (application.calls.length !== expected.length || expected.some(([identifier, controller], index) => application.calls[index]?.[0] !== identifier || application.calls[index]?.[1] !== controller)) { throw new Error('documented tree_view entrypoint exports are out of sync'); } })"
scripts.test:js: npm run test:entrypoints && npm test && npm run test:browser
